name: Low-Fat Frosted Brownie Cookies
recipeIngredient: 1 package (21.5 oz) Betty Crocker Fudge Brownie Mix
1/3 cup Low-fat Vanilla Yogurt (Dannon, Yoplait, etc.)
1 package (16 oz) Betty Crocker Creamy Deluxe Light Frosting
recipeInstructions:
1. Preheat oven to 350°F.
2. Spray a cookie sheet with nonstick spray.
3. In a bowl, mix together the dry brownie mix, egg whites, and yogurt until well combined.
4. Drop the mixture by teaspoonful onto the prepared cookie sheet.
5. Bake for 10 to 11 minutes, or until set.
6. Allow cookies to cool for 1 to 2 minutes on the baking sheet.
7. Remove cookies from the sheet and allow them to cool completely.
8. Frost with the light frosting.
9. Makes about 4 dozen cookies.
10. Each cookie contains approximately 85 calories, 1 gram of fat, and no cholesterol.
